listitem.para: a 1-by-1 matrix of doubles, integer value, nbvar > 2. The number of variables of the experiment
a 1-by-1 matrix of doubles, integer value, positive. The number of repetitions of the central point in the design (default nbcenter=1).
a m-by-nbvar matrix of doubles, the design of experiments, where m=nbvar*4+nbcenter

refsection.title: Examples
